Previously, from 2020 to 2023, I attended the technical vocational school 1 in Bochum and completed my school education as an information technology assistant with a focus on university qualification. An eight-week internship in application development at BROCKHAUS AG in summer 2022 was also part of my education.
personalInfo.about: I'm a dedicated apprentice at Deutsche Telekom, gaining hands-on experience in IT. My journey involves working on diverse projects, from network infrastructure to software development, contributing to real-world solutions. I'm eager to learn and grow in the tech industry.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A developer-friendly, highly customizable portfolio website template built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It features a clean, modern design, a modular data structure for easy content updates, and is pre-configured for automated deployment with GitLab CI/CD.
features: Fully responsive design with Tailwind CSS
Easy content management via dedicated data files
Dynamic theming with easily configurable accent colors
Dark mode support with system preference detection
Integrated CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and deployment
Modular and scalable component-based architecture
Separate pages for About, Projects, Gallery, Profile/CV, and Contact
projects.additionalInfo:
## Challenge

Developers often need a personal portfolio to showcase their skills and projects, but building one from scratch can be time-consuming. The challenge was to create a reusable, modern, and professional-looking portfolio template that is both easy to customize for non-designers and robust enough for experienced developers to extend.

### Key Problems Addressed

- **Time-Consuming Setup**: Building a portfolio from the ground up requires significant front-end development effort.
- **Customization Difficulty**: Many templates are hard to personalize without deep diving into complex code.
- **Deployment Complexity**: Setting up an automated deployment pipeline can be a hurdle.
- **Maintaining Modern Standards**: Ensuring the portfolio uses current technologies like React, TypeScript, and responsive design.

## Solution

This project provides a comprehensive, data-driven React template that separates personal content from the presentation layer. Users can quickly populate their information in simple TypeScript files, and the portfolio updates automatically. It includes a pre-configured GitLab CI/CD pipeline for seamless, automated deployments.

### Architecture & Implementation

The application is built on a modern front-end stack, emphasizing modularity and ease of use.

```
    Data Files (TS) → React Components → Dynamic Pages with React Router → GitLab CI/CD → Deployment
```

The core architecture separates data (`/src/data`), UI components (`/src/components`), and pages (`/src/pages`), making it highly maintainable and easy to extend. The theme is configured globally via a single file (`/src/config/theme.ts`).

### Core Features Implemented

- **Data-Driven Content**: Personal info, projects, and skills are managed in `src/data/personal.ts` and `src/data/projects.ts` for easy updates without touching React components.
- **Dynamic Theming**: Easily change the entire website's accent color by modifying a few variables.
- **Responsive UI**: Built with a mobile-first approach using Tailwind CSS's utility classes.
- **Modern Development Standards**: Fully typed with TypeScript for better developer experience and code quality.

projects.title: STREETSTANCED E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A production-ready full-stack e-commerce platform built with Spring Boot 3.2, dual React 19 frontends, and PostgreSQL. Features enterprise-grade architecture with Clerk/JWT dual authentication, Stripe payment processing, Zustand state management, and comprehensive admin capabilities.
features: Dual frontend architecture: Customer storefront and admin management panel
Clerk integration for customer authentication with Zustand state management
JWT-based admin authentication with custom admin panel
Stripe payment integration for secure checkout processing
Product categories: Clothing, Jewelry, Car Fragrances, Stickers
Advanced admin features: order management, inventory control, statistics dashboard
Real-time file upload system for product images
Responsive design with Tailwind CSS and Headless UI components
Spring Boot 3.2 REST API with PostgreSQL and JPA/Hibernate
Docker containerization with development and production configurations
Flyway database migrations for schema versioning
Comprehensive testing setup with Jest and JUnit
projects.additionalInfo:
## Technical Overview

StreetStanced is a **production-ready e-commerce platform** built with enterprise-grade architecture featuring three distinct tiers: customer-facing storefront, administrative management panel, and robust REST API backend. The implementation demonstrates advanced full-stack development patterns with modern authentication systems, payment processing integration, and comprehensive administrative capabilities.

## Technical Architecture

The system follows a **modern three-tier architecture** with clear separation of concerns across customer experience, administrative management, and backend services.

### System Architecture

```
Customer Frontend (React 19 + Clerk Auth)
    ↓
Admin Frontend (React 19 + JWT Auth)
    ↓
Spring Boot 3.2 API (Java 21)
    ↓
PostgreSQL Database + File Storage
```

### Backend (Spring Boot 3.2 + Java 21)

- **Modern Framework**: Spring Boot 3.2 with Java 21 for latest performance improvements
- **Dual Authentication**: JWT-based admin authentication + Clerk integration for customers
- **Payment Processing**: Stripe integration for secure checkout and payment handling
- **Database**: PostgreSQL with JPA/Hibernate and Flyway migrations
- **API Design**: RESTful APIs with separate admin (`/api/admin/*`) and public endpoints
- **File Management**: Robust file upload system for product images with validation

### Dual Frontend Architecture

**Customer Storefront (shop-frontend/):**
- **Framework**: React 19 with TypeScript for cutting-edge performance
- **Authentication**: Clerk integration for seamless user experience
- **State Management**: Zustand for efficient cart and user state management
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with modern, responsive design
- **Payment**: Stripe integration for secure checkout process

**Admin Panel (admin frontend/):**
- **Framework**: React 19 with TypeScript for type safety
- **Authentication**: Custom JWT-based authentication for administrative access
- **UI Components**: Headless UI and Heroicons for accessible, high-quality interfaces
- **Features**: Complete CRUD operations for products, categories, and inventory

## Containerization & Deployment

The entire platform is containerized using **Docker**, with separate Dockerfiles for each component and a comprehensive `docker-compose.yml` for orchestrating the environment. This ensures environment parity across development, testing, and production stages.

projects.title: CovidBot Discord Bot
projects.description: A comprehensive Discord bot built with Python that provides real-time COVID-19 statistics and information for Germany. The bot offers detailed incidence values, vaccination data, and recovery statistics for federal states and cities across Germany through simple Discord commands.
features: Real-time COVID-19 incidence tracking for German regions
Reproduction factor (R-value) monitoring
Infection and death toll statistics by location
Vaccination progress and appointment assistance
Recovery data for federal states
Interactive incidence map visualization
Location-based queries for cities and states
projects.additionalInfo:
## Challenge

During the COVID-19 pandemic, accessing accurate and up-to-date information about infection rates, vaccination progress, and regional statistics became crucial for German communities. The challenge was to create an **accessible platform** that could deliver real-time COVID-19 data directly within Discord servers, making it easy for communities to stay informed without leaving their communication platform.

### Key Problems Addressed

- **Information Fragmentation**: Official data was scattered across multiple government websites
- **Accessibility**: Complex interfaces made it difficult for average users to access data quickly
- **Real-time Updates**: Users needed current information without manual checking
- **Regional Specificity**: Different communities needed location-specific data

## Solution

Built a comprehensive **Discord bot using Python** that integrates with German health authorities' APIs to provide instant COVID-19 statistics through simple commands. The bot transforms complex government data into accessible, user-friendly responses.

### Architecture & Implementation

```
        Discord Commands → Python Bot → Government APIs → Data Processing → Formatted Response
```

### Core Commands Implemented

- **`!inzidenz [location]`** - COVID-19 incidence values for specific regions
- **`!rwert`** - National reproduction factor monitoring
- **`!allefälle [location]`** - Infection statistics by location
- **`!alletode [location]`** - Death toll information
- **`!impfung [location]`** - Vaccination progress and statistics
- **`!genesen [location]`** - Recovery data tracking
- **`!impftermin`** - Vaccination appointment assistance
- **`!inzidenzkarte`** - Visual incidence map generation

### Technical Features

- **Real-time Data Integration**: Connected to official German health APIs
- **Location Intelligence**: Support for federal states and city-level queries
- **Data Visualization**: Automated generation of incidence maps and charts

projects.title: KitchenHub
projects.description: KitchenHub is an advanced, local-first inventory management system designed to eliminate food waste and modernize kitchen organization. By integrating high-speed barcode scanning with a local Large Language Model (LLM), the application not only tracks stock levels and expiry dates but also provides real-time, creative recipe suggestions based on what is actually in your fridge. The project prioritizes user privacy by keeping all sensitive data and AI processing within the local network.
features: Dual-mode barcode scanning: 'Add' for stock entry and 'Consume' for rapid removal
Automated metadata enrichment: Fetches nutrition (macros), brand, and category via OpenFoodFacts
Visual Expiry Management: Traffic light indicators (Green/Orange/Red) for proactive freshness tracking
Privacy-First AI Chef: Uses local Ollama LLMs (e.g., Llama 3) to generate recipes from current inventory
Real-time Connectivity: Live status dashboard for Database (Supabase) and AI service availability
Smart FIFO Logic: Automatic inventory sorting by 'Best Before' date to optimize consumption
Responsive Tablet UI: Modern, clean interface designed specifically for kitchen dashboard devices
Streaming Markdown AI Output: Watch recipes being generated in real-time with professional formatting
projects.additionalInfo:
## 🥗 The Vision: Ending Kitchen Chaos & Food Waste

Managing a kitchen inventory is a task often plagued by manual effort and forgotten items hidden in the back of the fridge. Every year, millions of tons of food are wasted simply because consumers lose track of 'Best Before' dates. 

**KitchenHub** was created to solve this using modern tech: a **'Zero-Click' inventory system** that turns manual tracking into a high-speed, automated experience.

---

## 🔒 Core Philosophy: Local-First & Privacy-Centric

In an era where 'Smart Home' often means 'Cloud-Dependent', KitchenHub takes a radically different path. I engineered this application to be entirely self-sufficient on a local network.

> *"Your inventory and eating habits are yours alone. No cloud accounts, no subscriptions, no tracking."*

- **Maximum Privacy**: All data is stored on a local Supabase instance. The AI model runs directly on your hardware.
- **Lightning Fast**: Eliminating round-trips to external servers for AI processing means instant recipe generation.
- **True Sovereignty**: You own your data. The system remains 100% functional even during internet outages.

---

## 🛠️ Technical Implementation Deep Dive

Building KitchenHub required integrating several distinct technologies into a seamless, reactive frontend experience.

### 1. Smart Scanning & Data Enrichment
Instead of tedious manual typing, the application natively supports hardware barcode scanners (USB/Bluetooth).

*   **The Flow**: `Scan Barcode` → `Query OpenFoodFacts API` → `Extract High-Res Images & Macros` → `Store in Supabase`.
*   **Algorithmic Intelligence**: The system goes beyond basic data storage. It utilizes a custom algorithm to estimate shelf life based on product categories (e.g., assigning 14 days for fresh milk vs. 365 days for canned pasta). This ensures accurate expiry alerts from the very first scan.

### 2. The AI Chef (Local LLM Integration)
The standout technical achievement is the **AI Recipe Generator**, powered by a local **Ollama** server.

*   **Context-Aware Prompt Engineering**: The system dynamically constructs complex prompts containing your *exact* inventory items and formats them for optimal LLM comprehension.
*   **Reactive Streaming UI**: Leveraging React 19's latest features and the `getReader()` API, the generated Markdown recipe is streamed chunk-by-chunk to the user. This creates an engaging experience where users can start reading instructions while the AI is still 'thinking'.

### 3. Visual FIFO Management
To directly combat food waste, the UI implements a strict **FIFO (First In, First Out)** sorting logic combined with visual cues.

*   **Traffic Light System**: Items are dynamically color-coded based on urgency: **Red** (Expired), **Orange** (Use Soon), and **Green** (Stable).
*   **Nutritional Transparency**: Integrated progress bars visualize the macros (Protein, Carbs, Fat) of every product, transforming the inventory into a tool for healthier eating decisions.

---

## 🚀 Roadmap & Future Expansion

The foundation is built, but the vision for KitchenHub is expanding:

1.  **Family Sync**: Implementing Supabase Realtime to allow multi-device synchronization across a household.
2.  **Smart Shopping Lists**: Algorithmic generation of shopping lists based on defined threshold levels and consumed items.
3.  **Mobile Companion**: A lightweight React Native application for quick scanning while away from the main kitchen dashboard.

projects.title: Receipt Tracker
projects.description: Receipt Tracker is a sophisticated mobile utility built with Flutter that revolutionizes how groups and shared households manage their expenses. By combining on-device OCR with Google's Gemini 1.5 Flash AI, the app transforms messy physical receipts into structured, digital line-items. It enables users to assign costs with surgical precision, tracking exactly who owes what in real-time while maintaining a completely local-first data approach for maximum security.
features: Hybrid Analysis: High-speed local OCR (ML Kit) combined with Gemini AI for intelligent parsing
Intelligent Item Grouping: Automatically handles multi-quantity items and complex discount structures
Granular Assignment: Split items by quantity or percentage among participants
Dynamic Debt Dashboard: Real-time calculation of balances with grouped person views
Direct Platform Integration: Share itemized PDF/Text bills directly via WhatsApp, Signal, or Email
Local Persistence: Secure SQLite storage for all transaction history and receipt images
PDF Support: Import digital receipts directly from your file system or email attachments
Material Design 3: A beautiful, adaptive UI that supports system-wide Light and Dark modes
projects.additionalInfo:
## 🧾 The Vision: Ending the WG-Accounting Nightmare

We've all been there: staring at a mile-long grocery receipt after a group dinner or a WG shopping trip. Multiple people are involved, some shared items, some personal items, and absolutely no easy way to split it fairly without spending 20 minutes hunched over a calculator. 

**Receipt Tracker** was engineered to automate this entire painful process using AI-driven context awareness and a radically simplified user interface.

---

## 🧠 Technical Architecture: Hybrid Intelligence

Most receipt scanners stop at basic Optical Character Recognition (OCR), leaving the user to manually correct misinterpreted prices and garbled text. Receipt Tracker goes further by implementing a **Hybrid Intelligence** model.

### 1. Local OCR (Google ML Kit)
The initial text extraction happens directly on the device using Google ML Kit. 
*   **Why Local?** It ensures high-speed processing and significantly reduces the payload size before any data is sent to the cloud. 
*   **The Output**: It extracts 'raw blocks' of text, coordinates, and bounding boxes, which are often unstructured and messy depending on the receipt's print quality.

### 2. Contextual Parsing (Gemini 1.5 Flash)
The raw, noisy text is then securely transmitted to Google's **Gemini 1.5 Flash AI** accompanied by a highly specialized system prompt. Unlike standard algorithms, the LLM understands context:
*   **Implicit Logic**: It understands that a line reading `2 x 1.50` directly below `Apple Juice` means the juice costs `3.00` in total.
*   **Noise Filtering**: It is instructed to automatically identify and ignore irrelevant data like tax sub-totals (MwSt), payment method details (Visa/Terminal), and loyalty point summaries.
*   **Structured Output**: The prompt enforces a strict JSON schema return, allowing the app to seamlessly map the AI's response into strongly typed Dart objects.

---

## 🗄️ Robust Data Management & State

Managing complex financial states required a solid architectural foundation.

### The SQLite Engine
Beneath the sleek UI lies a highly normalized SQLite database schema designed to handle complex relationships:
*   **Persons & Groups**: Organize participants by household, trip, or event.
*   **Line-Item Assignments**: A many-to-many relationship mapping specific *quantities* of an item to specific people.
*   **Dynamic Debt Calculation**: Complex SQL `JOIN` operations calculate the 'Outstanding Debt' by aggregating all unpaid assignments across the user's entire history in real-time.

### Reactive UI with Provider
Built meticulously with the **Provider pattern**, the application state is highly reactive. Every change in the database—be it a new receipt scan, a reassigned item, or a marked payment—triggers a ripple effect through the UI. This ensures the dashboard's financial overview is always perfectly perfectly in sync with the underlying data, without requiring manual refreshes.

---

## ⚡ Features for the Power User

- **Bulk Sharing**: Users can select multiple receipts and generate a comprehensive, combined Markdown summary to send directly to a roommate via WhatsApp or Signal.
- **PDF Import Engine**: Not all receipts are physical. The app utilizes `pdfx` to render PDF pages into high-res images, allowing digital invoices to be processed with the exact same AI pipeline.
- **Adaptive Material 3**: A fully immersive implementation of Google's Material Design 3, including a stunning Dark Mode for late-night accounting sessions.

---

## 🎯 What I Learned

Developing Receipt Tracker was a masterclass in **Prompt Engineering**—specifically tuning an LLM to consistently return valid, structured JSON from chaotic input data. Furthermore, managing **asynchronous streams** in Flutter and orchestrating the handoff between local OCR processing and cloud-based AI inference was a key technical challenge overcome during this project.
